userStories.title: Fix misleading Task classified log
userStories.description:
The 'Task classified' log in routing.ts currently logs the raw LLM output even after config/cache overrides are applied. This makes it look like overrides are ignored when they aren't.

Fix: Ensure the log reflects the final routing state (ctx.routing) after all overrides and greenfield detection are finished.

Acceptance criteria:
1. Log shows final testStrategy/complexity/modelTier after all overrides
2. Existing tests pass

userStories.title: Fix story interleaving in getNextStory()
userStories.description:
When a story fails and escalates, getNextStory() currently round-robins to the next pending story. This wastes iterations by jumping between unrelated tasks.

Fix: Update getNextStory() in src/execution/sequential-executor.ts to prioritize retrying the current story until max attempts are reached before moving to the next story.

Acceptance criteria:
1. If current story is failed but has attempts remaining, it is picked again for retry
2. Run order: S1-I1 -> S1-I2 (retry) -> S2-I1 (if S1 complete/failed out)
3. Unit test for getNextStory() behavior

userStories.title: Log exitCode/stderr on agent failure
userStories.description:
Agent session failures currently log 'rateLimited' but hide the actual exit code and stderr. This makes diagnosing silent failures (like 401, 500, or process crashes) difficult.

Fix: Audit src/agents/adapters/claude.ts and src/pipeline/stages/execution.ts. Ensure the 'Agent session failed' event includes exitCode and the tail of stderr in its data payload.

Acceptance criteria:
1. agent.complete event includes exitCode and stderr tail on failure
2. Logs are machine-readable and don't break JSONL format

userStories.title: Integrate Interaction Chain into Runner Loop
userStories.description:
The Interaction system is initialized but never called from the core orchestrator. This is a major integration task.

Fix:
1. Add 'human-review' to TriggerName in src/interaction/types.ts and metadata in TRIGGER_METADATA
2. Pass interactionChain from runner.ts -> executeSequential -> Pipeline
3. Inject 'interaction' into PipelineContext
4. Call executeTrigger('human-review', ...) when a story reaches max retries or a critical failure occurs
5. Verify other triggers (security-review, story-ambiguity) are called at relevant pipeline stages

Acceptance criteria:
1. interactionChain is accessible in PipelineContext
2. Story reaching max retries triggers a 'human-review' interaction request
3. Test with CLI interaction plugin (non-headless)
